notes: Captured against the perfect-recall in-process backend (RecordingBackend).
Measures wake/lookup/resume quality ladder: shallow queries get cheap summary, targeted queries get 1-3 records, resume reconstructs full task state.
Pass gates: wake_p95_tokens=2000, wake_completeness=0.80; lookup_completeness=0.85, lookup_tokens_p95=500; resume_completeness=0.95, resume_tokens_p95=6000; contract_adherence_rate=0.95.
Baseline regression check: future runs must not drop below these floors across all depth classes.
